description: A React component page that visualizes entity relationship networks for fraud detection. It fetches network data, renders an interactive force-directed graph on canvas, and provides UI controls for zooming, filtering, and inspecting nodes.

methods.name: loadGraph
methods.description: Fetches network data based on current claimIdFilter and initializes node positions for rendering.

methods.name: handleCanvasClick
methods.description: Detects click events on canvas to select and highlight nodes.
